title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Runwal Group

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Runwal Group
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Runwal Group in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Runwal Group:
Runwal Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Runwal Group!
